---
name: Feature request
about: New topic coverage, new reference file, or routing improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What's missing or could be better?**
Describe the Rive topic, feature, or workflow that isn't currently covered well.

**Why is this useful?**
What kinds of questions would this help answer?

**Relevant docs**
Link to the official Rive documentation page(s) that cover this topic.

**Suggested approach (optional)**
Should this be added to an existing reference file or does it warrant a new one?
